content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 11 (O:11):

From the image, atom O:11 (oxygen with index 11) is covalently connected to:
- C:8 (carbon atom with index 8)
- C:12 (carbon atom with index 12)

I can see clear yellow bonds (representing covalent bonds) connecting O:11 to both C:8 and C:12. There are no other atoms directly bonded to O:11 in this structure.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 1307, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_1307.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 11 (O) are:
- Atom index 8, element C
- Atom index 12, element C

Geomconf_index: 1307

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 11, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
